data.body:
Bronzite is an iron-magnesium silicate. And magnesium is the mineral most people are deficient in.

Magnesium regulates over 300 enzymatic reactions in the body. It controls muscle relaxation, nerve function, blood sugar regulation, and blood pressure. Most adults don't get enough of it from food.
